# Casa Norte Concierge & Property Management

Casa Norte is a boutique, family-owned property management company serving The Woodlands and North Houston, Texas.

## Property types
- Second homes and vacation homes
- Long-term residential rentals
- Short-term rentals
- Select commercial properties, including flex and small industrial assets

## Core services
- Scheduled property inspections and photographic reports
- Maintenance and vendor coordination
- Tenant and guest communication
- Operational and document management
- Cleaning, landscaping and home preparation coordination
- Secure client portal with reports, photos, maintenance updates and service history

## Primary service areas
The Woodlands, Spring, Conroe, Magnolia, Tomball and North Houston.

## Contact
Email: info@casanorte.us
Website: https://www.casanorte.us/
